title: Pattern Candidates To Add
description: Tracks pattern candidates that surface during research of compositions but are not yet catalogued. Each entry names a proposed pattern, captures the evidence that suggested it, and pins which composition raised it. Worked through in batches later; entries graduate by being authored into patterns-src/.

id.description: Proposed kebab-case id. Must not collide with any existing pattern id in patterns-src/.

kind_hint.description: Whether this candidate is a positive pattern or an anti-pattern.

category_hint.description: Suggested taxonomy category (e.g. multi-agent, safety-control, memory). Optional — authoring may re-classify.

summary.description: One or two sentences naming what the pattern does or what it forbids.

composition.description: Composition id (recipe or framework) that surfaced the candidate.

raised_by.description: Which compositions raised this candidate, and what upstream evidence prompted the suggestion.

status.description: Lifecycle: proposed = on the list; drafting = entry being written in patterns-src/; authored = lives in patterns-src/ now (this candidate can be deleted); rejected = considered and not pursued, with a reason.
